mission.title: knative: How to use locally built docker image?
mission.description: How to use locally built docker image?. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current knative deployment
steps.description:
Verify your knative version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
helm list -n knative 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working knative installation.

steps.title: Review knative configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative
```
## In what area(s)?

## Ask your question here:

I have built a simple docker image for a node app that serves a `hello world` on port 8080, if I `minikube ssh` and run `docker images` I can see my image under `minikube-test`.

steps.title: Apply the fix for How to use locally built docker image?
steps.description:
Locally built docker images don't seem to have a digest. (Possible explanation: [Why doesn't my newly-created docker have a digest?](https://stackoverflow.com/a/39812035))

```
$ docker images --digests | grep minikube-test
minikube-test                       v1        <none>        ffe2d2bc2aa4   
```yaml
.
.
containers:
  - name: minikube-test
    image: minikube-test:v1
    imagePullPolicy: Never
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "How to use locally built docker image?" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Locally built docker images don't seem to have a digest.
codeSnippets:
.
.
containers:
  - name: minikube-test
    image: minikube-test:v1
    imagePullPolicy: Never

apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1
   kind: Service
   metadata:
     name: minikube-test
   spec:
     template:
       spec:
         containers:
           - name: minikube-test
             image: minikube-test:v1
             imagePullPolicy: Never
             env:
               - name: TARGET
                 value: "minikube-test knative"

$ kubectl apply -f service.yaml
service.serving.knative.dev/minikube-test created

$ kubectl get routes
NAME            URL                                        READY   REASON
minikube-test   http://minikube-test.default.example.com   False   RevisionMissing

$ kubectl describe ksvc/minikube-test
Name:         minikube-test
Namespace:    default
.
.

    Reason:                      RevisionFailed

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible.
